title: Declassified UAP files spotlight San Diego sightings
description: The Pentagon has released decades of declassified UAP sightings, including military footage and witness accounts, from around the world, with some of the more talked about ones from San Diego previously declassified by the Department of Defense.

title: Tea houses and UFO villages: The ultimate 5-day guide to Taipei
description: Taipei hums in layers. Temples waft incense beside neon arcades. Locals start their days with scallion pancakes or hot soy milk, and end them with a cocktail behind an unmarked door. It's a place where centuries-old rituals coexist with pop culture kitsch. Every alley seems to lead to a shrine, a cat, or an unforgettable steaming bowl of deliciousness. What...

title: Trump's Pentagon UFO Release Sparks Hidden War Panic With Mystery Objects Caught Over Syria and Lake Huron
description: Newly released Pentagon footage of UFOs over Syria and Lake Huron has reignited debates on military transparency and national security, with Trump's involvement drawing significant public attention.

title: Army UFO whistleblower made wild claims he was telepathically linked to 'mantis alien' before his death
description: A former US Army sergeant claimed he spent most of his life in telepathic contact with an alien companion before his death.

title: MATTINGLY: Angels, demons and centuries of UFO questions
description: For centuries, stargazers of many kinds have debated the meaning of unidentified objects in the heavens and encounters with mysterious beings on earth.
